# Third-party dependencies

## Linear Centroids Hypothesis (paper code)

Directory: `LinearCentroidsHypothesis/` (git submodule — not included until you init it)

```bash
git submodule add https://github.com/ThomasWalker1/LinearCentroidsHypothesis.git third_party/LinearCentroidsHypothesis
git submodule update --init --recursive
```

Upstream: https://github.com/ThomasWalker1/LinearCentroidsHypothesis

This repo accesses it only through `lce.centroid_adapter`.
